description: Create visualization of AlphaFold confidence and genomic context for YrhB
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

# Create a visualization of the AlphaFold pLDDT scores
fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 1, figsize=(14, 10), gridspec_kw={'height_ratios': [2, 1]})

# Panel 1: pLDDT per residue
sequence = "MITYHDAFAKANHYLDDADLPVVITLHGRFSQGWYFCFEAREFLETGDEAARLAGNAPFIIDKDSGEIHSLGTAKPLEEYLQDYEIKKATFGLP"
plddt = [88.25, 95.25, 97.12, 97.50, 97.56, 97.69, 98.25, 98.00, 97.69, 97.81, 
         98.06, 97.12, 96.69, 96.00, 96.12, 94.19, 90.75, 89.50, 89.88, 92.38,
         95.81, 97.31, 96.88, 97.94, 97.44, 97.44, 98.06, 97.88, 97.62, 96.62,
         95.06, 96.06, 97.50, 98.62, 98.50, 98.50, 97.94, 97.88, 97.69, 97.38,
         97.19, 97.75, 97.75, 97.38, 97.88, 97.69, 97.06, 97.31, 96.50, 95.62,
         96.00, 96.31, 95.75, 91.56, 88.81, 93.75, 95.94, 97.31, 98.06, 98.19,
         98.25, 97.44, 96.75, 95.50, 94.88, 96.44, 96.69, 97.12, 96.31, 95.75,
         96.62, 95.69, 95.50, 95.62, 95.38, 96.06, 96.44, 96.88, 97.75, 97.38,
         97.69, 97.19, 96.31, 96.69, 96.19, 95.62, 94.38, 93.50, 93.00, 93.44,
         89.12, 81.00, 67.19, 53.72]

residues = list(range(1, len(plddt)+1))
colors = []
for p in plddt:
    if p > 90: colors.append('#0053D6')      # Very high
    elif p >= 70: colors.append('#65CBF3')    # Confident
    elif p >= 50: colors.append('#FFDB13')    # Low
    else: colors.append('#FF7D45')            # Very low

axes[0].bar(residues, plddt, color=colors, width=1.0, edgecolor='none')
axes[0].axhline(y=90, color='gray', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5, label='Very high (>90)')
axes[0].axhline(y=70, color='gray', linestyle=':', alpha=0.5, label='Confident (>70)')
axes[0].set_xlabel('Residue number', fontsize=12)
axes[0].set_ylabel('pLDDT score', fontsize=12)
axes[0].set_title('AlphaFold Confidence (pLDDT) for YrhB (P46857)\nMean pLDDT = 95.2 — Very High Confidence Model', fontsize=14)
axes[0].set_ylim(40, 100)
axes[0].set_xlim(0, 95)

# Add legend
patches = [
    mpatches.Patch(color='#0053D6', label='Very high (>90): 86 res (91.5%)'),
    mpatches.Patch(color='#65CBF3', label='Confident (70-90): 6 res (6.4%)'),
    mpatches.Patch(color='#FFDB13', label='Low (50-70): 2 res (2.1%)'),
]
axes[0].legend(handles=patches, loc='lower left', fontsize=9)

# Mark W34 (conserved Imm35 tryptophan)
axes[0].annotate('W34\n(conserved Imm35 Trp)', xy=(34, 98.62), xytext=(45, 92),
                fontsize=9, ha='center', color='darkred',
                arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='darkred'))

# Panel 2: Genomic context
axes[1].set_xlim(3581500, 3588500)
axes[1].set_ylim(-1, 3)

gene_data = [
    ('yhhZ', 3581863, 3583041, 1, '#aaa', 'putative\nendonuclease'),
    ('yrhA', 3583038, 3584309, 1, '#ccc', 'pseudogene'),
    ('insA-6', 3583483, 3583758, 1, '#f9a825', 'IS1'),
    ('insB-6', 3583677, 3584180, 1, '#f9a825', 'IS1'),
    ('yrhD', 3584404, 3584559, 1, '#aaa', 'unchar.'),
    ('yrhB', 3584759, 3585043, 1, '#e53935', 'chaperone\n(Imm35 fold)'),
    ('ggt', 3585081, 3586823, -1, '#4caf50', 'glutathione\nhydrolase'),
    ('yhhA', 3586943, 3587383, 1, '#aaa', 'DUF2756'),
    ('ugpQ', 3587370, 3588113, -1, '#4caf50', 'phospho-\ndiesterase'),
]

for name, start, end, strand, color, desc in gene_data:
    y = 1.5
    height = 0.6
    arrow_width = (end - start)
    
    if strand == 1:
        axes[1].annotate('', xy=(end, y), xytext=(start, y),
                        arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color=color, lw=8, mutation_scale=15))
    else:
        axes[1].annotate('', xy=(start, y), xytext=(end, y),
                        arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color=color, lw=8, mutation_scale=15))
    
    mid = (start + end) / 2
    axes[1].text(mid, 2.3, name, ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=8, fontweight='bold')
    axes[1].text(mid, 0.6, desc, ha='center', va='top', fontsize=6, fontstyle='italic')

axes[1].set_xlabel('Genomic position (bp)', fontsize=12)
axes[1].set_title('Genomic Context of yrhB in E. coli K12 MG1655\nNo adjacent toxin gene — inconsistent with Imm35 immunity function', fontsize=12)
axes[1].set_yticks([])
axes[1].spines['left'].set_visible(False)
axes[1].spines['top'].set_visible(False)
axes[1].spines['right'].set_visible(False)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('yrhb_analysis.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved: yrhb_analysis.png")
